title: Axo's Melee's
description:
Axo's Melee's adds a variety of melee weapons!

Originally in use for my MC Area-14 Roleplay server I decided to publish it for all to use it! Feel free to credit me for any large or small projects
body:
This reasource pack adds a variety of tactical melee weapons such as a Baton, to a tactical tomahawk, Knife, machete, sledge hammer and a riot shield!

This resource pack will be used for my SCP Roleplay server "**AREA-14**". Feel free to use the models (From the old first verion) for free!
